name: get_address_assigns
full_help:
get_address_assigns

Description: 
Get Address Assignments.

Syntax: 
get_address_assigns  [-source <arg>] [-target <arg>] [-block <arg>] [-quiet]
                     [-verbose] [<path>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-source]   Filter by source Address Block.
  [-target]   Filter by target Address Space.
  [-block]    Current block.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<path>]    Address Assignment path to search.

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
